name: Curried Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Assemble and attach the rotor slicer/shredder using a thin slicer cone (no 4).
2. Turn to speed 4 and slice the cabbage.
3. Steam the cabbage over boiling water just until tender.
4. Melt butter in a double broiler over boiling water.
5. Stir in flour, pepper, curry powder, onion, and salt.
6. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly until smooth.
7. Continue cooking until thickened. Do not boil.
8. Place cabbage in a serving dish and add sauce. Toss well to coat the cabbage.
9. Serve immediately.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings
